recommendations.title: Albino Alligator
recommendations.overview: While escaping from a foiled robbery attempt, three thieves find themselves surrounded by police at a New Orleans bar--only they're not the people the police are searching for.

recommendations.title: Jane Austen Wrecked My Life
recommendations.overview: An aspiring author looking to get more out of life takes up a writing residency and finds herself in the sort of romantic entanglements that could come from the pages of a Jane Austen novel.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Sea
recommendations.overview: Based on the life and career of legendary entertainer, Bobby Darin, the biopic moves back and forth between his childhood and adulthood, to tell the tale of his life.

recommendations.title: Nim's Island
recommendations.overview: A young girl inhabits an isolated island with her scientist father and communicates with a reclusive author of the novel she's reading.

recommendations.title: Ray
recommendations.overview: Born on a sharecropping plantation in Northern Florida, Ray Charles went blind at seven. Inspired by a fiercely independent mom who insisted he make his own way, He found his calling and his gift behind a piano keyboard. Touring across the Southern m

recommendations.title: Gabriel's Inferno: Part III
recommendations.overview: The final part of the film adaption of the erotic romance novel Gabriel's Inferno written by an anonymous Canadian author under the pen name Sylvain Reynard.

recommendations.title: Sex and Lucía
recommendations.overview: Various lives converge on an isolated island, all connected by an author whose novel has become inextricably entwined with his own life.

recommendations.title: Out of Africa
recommendations.overview: Tells the life story of Danish author Karen Blixen, who at the beginning of the 20th century moved to Africa to build a new life for herself. The film is based on her 1937 autobiographical novel.

recommendations.title: A Writer's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: Lu Kongwen is the author of a fantasy novel series following a heroic teenager, also named Kongwen, on a quest to end the tyrannical rule of Lord Redmane, under the guidance of a Black Armor. But through a strange twist of fate, the fantasy world of

recommendations.title: Caravaggio
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the life of the celebrated 17th-century Baroque painter Michelangelo Merisi da Caravaggio through his brilliant, nearly blasphemous paintings and his flirtations with the underworld.
